templateMetadata.description: Individual sales rep's pipeline grouped by stage with key metrics and action items
templateMetadata.useCase: Daily pipeline review, prioritize deals, identify stalled opportunities, quota tracking
customizationPoints: Stage picklist values (match your org's sales process)
Additional fields for next steps, probability, etc.
prerequisites: Opportunity object with standard fields (Stage, Amount, CloseDate)
Sales stages configured in your org
User has opportunities assigned to them

reportMetadata.name: My Pipeline by Stage
reportMetadata.description: My open opportunities grouped by sales stage with totals

reportFilters.customizationNote: Automatically filters to current user's opportunities
Change to NEXT_90_DAYS, THIS_YEAR, or remove to see all open opps

customSummaryFormulas.name: Weighted_Pipeline
customSummaryFormulas.note: Multiply each opp's amount by its probability to get weighted forecast

customSummaryFormulas.name: Days_in_Stage_Avg
customSummaryFormulas.description: Average days opportunities have been in current stage

chart.note: Funnel chart shows pipeline narrowing through sales stages

calculatedFieldsRecommended.description: Number of days since opportunity entered current stage
Next action to advance the opportunity

steps: 1. Verify your org's sales stages match template (Qualification, Proposal, Negotiation, etc.)
2. Update CLOSE_DATE filter to match your planning horizon
3. Add/remove columns based on your org's key fields
4. Deploy report to Private Reports folder (visible only to you)
5. Create custom summary formula for Weighted Pipeline (if needed)
6. Add to personal dashboard or bookmark for daily use

actionItems: Deals with no activity in 14+ days need immediate attention
Deals in stage >30 days may be stalled
Focus on deals closing this month/quarter
